content: Skip to login   Skip to main content   Skip to chat   Personal   Personal interest rates, fees and charges   Home loan interest rates   Home loans Home loan interest rates   See our current fixed and variable interest rates for both owners and investors.  Book an appointment   Understanding our rates  These are our current fixed and variable home loan interest rates for new loans for both owner occupiersOwner occupierAn owner-occupier owns the home they live in which is used as their primary residence. They don’t rent out the home or use it for investment purposes.   and investors. Our interest rates are NAB’s advertised indicator rates plus or minus any margins.  Also see the current indicator rates (PDF, 42KB), opens in new window   a home loan expert uses to calculate our current interest rates.  See our full list of home loan rates   Choose your loan details  Your interest rate will vary depending on a variety of factors. Choose from the options below to view the rates suitable to your situation.  Remember to consider your loan to value ratio (LVR). Your LVR is the amount you're borrowing, as a percentage of the value of the property you’re buying. Learn more about the NAB Portfolio Facility.  Hide rates  Help and support  Get the most out of your NAB home loan and discover popular help and support tasks.  Manage your NAB home loan   Set up or change home loan repayments   Estimate your home loan repayments   Other life moments   Investing in property   Find out how investing in property can help you build wealth.  Renovating your home   A home renovation can help you increase equity or meet life’s changing needs.  Buying your next home   Thinking about buying a house or freeing up equity? We can help make it happen.  Tools and calculators  No matter what your situation – whether you’re buying your first home or investing in a new property – we have a variety of tools and calculators to help you get organised.   Which home loan is right for me?   We’ll help you find a home loan that suits your needs.  How much can I borrow?   Get an estimate of how much you can afford to borrow for your home.  Home loan repayment calculator   Compare your loan amount with other factors to estimate your loan repayments.  Property insights , opens in new window   Get information about a suburb or specific property, coupled with estimated property values and sales and rental history.  See all home loan calculators   How we define some important words  You might also call it a glossary, definitions or a list of important words and phrases. Either way, this section helps you make sense of our interest rates.  Advertised (indicator) rate   Refers to a rate used as a base for calculating an interest rate being described in our loan contracts as our “advertised” rate.  Interest rate   Refers to the interest rate charged on individual loan products. The interest rates shown here are our current standard rates and don’t include special rates you might be eligible for. The interest rate is the advertised indicator rate for the home loan plus or minus any margins.  Comparison rate   Refers to a single figure that includes our current standard interest rate for the loan plus certain standard fees and charges (not all fees and charges are included). This is to help you compare the cost of loans.  Residential investment   This includes purchasing, refinancing or renovating a residential investment property.  Contact us for home loan related queries   This is how you can get in touch.  Start a conversation with a banker   Log into either NAB Internet Banking or the NAB app.  Tap on the message icon.  Type ‘speak to a person’ in the conversation window.  Call us   Speak to a home loan expert about a new or existing home loan.  Monday to Friday, 8:00am to 7:00pm (AEST/AEDT)  Saturday to Sunday, 9:00am to 6:00pm (AEST/AEDT)  13 78 79  Book an appointment   Make an appointment to see us at your nearest branch, ask a mobile banker to come to you or ask us to call you back.  Book an appointment   Important Information   Terms and Conditions  Disclaimer 1   Rates are NAB’s advertised indicator rates plus or minus any margins and available for new home loans.  Disclaimer 2   Comparison rates are based on a secured loan of $150,000 over a term of 25 years  WARNING: This comparison rate applies only to the example or examples given. Different amounts and terms will result in different comparison rates. Costs such as redraw fees or early repayment fees, and cost savings such as fee waivers, are not included in the comparison rate but may influence the cost of the loan.  Disclaimer 3   LVR tiered pricing  LVR tiered interest rates for the NAB Tailored Home Loan are accessible to:  new home loan contracts issued on or after 25 July 2022 for customers who apply through brokers (broker customers) or on or after 12 September 2022 for retail customers who apply directly to us (retail customers), and  credit critical variations (for example, a loan increase or a change to security) to home loans for both broker customers and retail customers made after those dates.  LVR tiered interest rates do not apply to:  NAB Tailored Home Loans issued prior to the above mentioned dates (unless a credit critical variation is made after those dates),  NAB Tailored Home Loans for customers who have a Business and Private Relationship with NAB – see Important interest rate information for Business and Private Wealth customers.  NAB Tailored Home Loans included in a Choice Package, nor  NAB Base Variable Home Loans.  Disclaimer 4   Important interest rate information for Business and Private Wealth customers  Customers that have a Business or Private Wealth relationship with NAB are able to access the same initial advertised rate as our retail customers. Please note that we will achieve this for those customers by applying a discount customer margin. This customer margin will stop applying in a range of situations including (but not limited to):  Product swaps (switching your home loan product)  End or expiry of an interest only period  Commencement, end or expiry of a fixed rate period  Loan limit increases.  Please speak to your banker for further information about scenarios where you may lose your customer margin.  Disclaimer 5   NAB Choice Package eligibility  Important: The NAB Choice Package Home Loan is no longer available for sale from 23 February 2023 for broker customers, from 17 March 2023 for retail (direct to bank) customers and from 18 August 2023 for customers with a Business or Private Wealth relationship with NAB, unless they have a current NAB Choice Package which is established before the respective off-sale date (and which remains ongoing).  Disclaimer 6   Interest-only periods  Before you choose an interest only period, take the time to consider these things:  Your debt doesn’t reduce while you only pay your interest charges because you’re not paying any of the principal.  You may owe more than your property is worth if its value decreases during an interest only period.  Your scheduled repayments will increase once your interest only period ends.  NAB Tailored Home Loan - Principal and Interest is the only product available to foreign (overseas) applicants. Conditions apply.  This section contains Important Information relevant to the page you are viewing, but you can't see it because you have JavaScript disabled on your browser. Please enable JavaScript and come back so you can see the complete page. It's important that you read the Important Information in this section before acting on any information on this page.  Apologies but the Important Information section you are trying to view is not displaying properly at the moment. Please refresh the page or try again later.   Other important information  Information and rates are correct as at 3 March 2025 and are subject to change. Applications for credit are subject to NAB’s credit approval criteria. Terms and Conditions apply to all NAB products and are available on application. Fees and charges are payable.  Annual package fee applies for NAB Choice Package (currently $395). Choice Package discounts and benefits only apply whilst your loan is part of a NAB Choice Package. When you apply for the NAB Choice Package, you must include in the package a minimum of $150,000 in eligible lending products (which are existing or approved lending).
